notes: Batch 01 is a clean, uniform set of 258 MileDown cloze cards (General Chemistry, Biology, Biochemistry); the tag breadcrumb prefixing every question/answer is the expected template element and was not treated as an error. No card-breaking errors were found: every {{cN::...}} cloze is well-formed and balanced, HTML tags are reasonably balanced, there are no unrendered template artifacts, and no LaTeX/MathJax is used (math is shown via images and <sub>/<sup>). Findings are minor: 12 image-occlusion clozes whose deletion is an image so the answer mirrors the question with no textual reveal (info), plus 5 warnings in supplementary content that does not block studying (one cloze wrapping a stray <div>, three Extra reference links with an 'ahttps://' typo, and one empty href); three further image-cloze cards (photon-energy equation, periodic-table orbital labels, egg pathway) were not flagged because their Extra fields reveal real explanatory text.
